FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class RatingControl

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI RatingControl: a row of stars set by click or press-and-sweep, with an optional caption. The control is a two-layer star row -- an always-present unset/background layer (outline glyph E734) and a clipped Set layer (filled glyph E735) revealed to the current rating. Faithful port of RatingControl.cpp:

  • State model -- Value (caller FloatSignal; -1 == unset), an unset PlaceholderValue shown until a real value is set, and an optional Caption.
  • Pointer preview -- press-and-sweep fills the stars to the pointer (with a partial tail) and lifts the foreground to the pointer-over visual-state color; release commits. IsClearEnabled clears the rating when you click the star equal to the current value. Implicit capture keeps the sweep alive OFF the strip while pressed, so dragging past the LEFT edge and releasing clears to NoValueSet (RatingControl.cpp:799-805, 856-863, 888-906). A TOUCH press lifts the hover-scale scalar to c_touchOverScale = 1.0 (vs mouse 0.8) so the focal star grows to full size under the finger.
  • Keyboard -- Left/Down -1, Right/Up +1, Home clears, End sets MaxRating (RatingControl::OnKeyDown).
  • Read-only / disabled -- ReadOnly renders a fixed rating with no interaction; IsEnabled=false dims the foreground to the disabled brush and gates all input.

Custom font/image item-info (RatingItemFontInfo/RatingItemImageInfo per-state glyphs/images) is deferred.

public sealed class RatingControl : Component

Field Value

int

NoValueSet

The WinUI c_noValueSetSentinel: Value <= this means "unset".

public const float NoValueSet = -1

Field Value

float

OnChange 

public Action<float>? OnChange

Field Value

Action<float>

PartCaption

The trailing caption (WinUI Caption TextBlock) — a TextEl part (Parts.Set<TextEl>(…)). No owned props.

public const string PartCaption = "Caption"

Field Value

string

PartRoot

The returned control root (star strip + caption). Owned: OnKeyDown (the arrow/Home/End rating keys), Role, Children.

public const string PartRoot = "Root"

Field Value

string

PartStarCell

Each star cell (applied to EVERY star — full, empty and partial alike). Owned: TransformBind + TransformOriginX/Y (the focal hover-scale expression about the cell centre).

public const string PartStarCell = "StarCell"

Field Value

string

PartStarRow

The interactive star strip (WinUI RatingBackgroundStackPanel). Owned: OnHoverMove, OnPointerDown, OnPointerPressed, OnDrag, OnClick, OnPointerExit (the hover/sweep/commit lifecycle), Children. NOTE: the sweep math maps pointer X over the STOCK width (StarSize/ItemSpacing) — resizing this part skews the star-under-pointer mapping.

public const string PartStarRow = "StarRow"

Field Value

string

Parts

Lightweight per-part styling (CSS ::part): modifiers keyed by the PartXxx consts; see TemplateParts for the contract.

Value 

public FloatSignal Value

Field Value

FloatSignal

Methods

Coerce(float, int)

Programmatic value coercion (RatingControl::CoerceValueBetweenMinAndMax): a negative value snaps to the NoValueSet (-1) "unset" sentinel; a value in (0,1] snaps up to 1 (a single star); a value above max clamps down to max. Fractional values in (1,max] keep their tail (the partial-star fill). Applied to both Value and PlaceholderValue at render time.

public static float Coerce(float value, int max)

Parameters

value float
max int

Returns

float

Create(FloatSignal, int, float, string, bool, bool, bool, Action<float>?) 

public static Element Create(FloatSignal value, int max = 5, float placeholder = -1, string caption = "", bool readOnly = false, bool isEnabled = true, bool isClearEnabled = true, Action<float>? onChange = null)

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
